/usr/bin/c++  -DGTEST_HAS_PTHREAD=1 -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_ind_bbands.dir/original_tests/test_ind_bbands.cpp.o -o test_ind_bbands   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/googletest/1.17.0/lib  -L/Users/yunjinqi/Documents/my_work/refactor_backtrader/backtrader_cpp/build_tests/tests  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/googletest/1.17.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/yunjinqi/Documents/my_work/refactor_backtrader/backtrader_cpp/build_tests/tests ../libbacktrader_core.a -lgtest -lgtest_main -lpthread
